message:
fix(security): constant-time hash comparisons, domain separator, overflow hardening, and flaky test

Replace == with ct_eq/ct_eq_bytes for hash/digest comparisons across 10 files
to prevent timing-attack side channels. Add missing SHA256 domain separator
in profile_tuning_harness hmac_sign. Use saturating_mul in fleet_quarantine
and transport_fault_gate to prevent overflow. Fix crash_loop_detector test
using wrong connector pin. Widen flaky bounded_mask timing assertion from
1µs to 50ms margin.

Beads: bd-dy9h, bd-3r1i, bd-1b8p, bd-jd79 (all closed)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
